_comment_idf_target: Do NOT pin IDF_TARGET here: it is injected into the integrated terminal and overrides the per-preset IDF_TARGET in each product's CMakePresets.json (products/worker, products/gateway), breaking the gateway (esp32s3) build with an esp32/esp32s3 mismatch. Each product's single preset sets its own target.
_comment_clangd: clangd can only follow one compile database at a time; point it at whichever product you are editing (products/worker/build or products/gateway/build).
